case_title: CHIU HUNG TAM VS. NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0 SERVED DEC-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL INDEMNITY COMPANY, INC.

SC-105 - REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE [JUDGMENT ENTERED JAN-23-24] FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. NATIONAL INDEMNITY COMPANY, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TAM, CHIU HUNG NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
ORDER ON SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER - THE REQUEST IS DENIED. AS MOOT. OTHER ORDERS: SEE ATTACHED AMENDED JUDGMENT. RE:[JUDGMENT ENTERED JAN-23-24]
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED DEC-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RE:IMPROPER DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHIU HUNG TAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE ISNURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GEORGETTE CUTHBERT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, CHIU HUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. NATIONAL INDEMNITY COMPANY, INC. PALINTIFF CANNOT RECEIVE A JUDGMENT AGAINST THE INSURANCE COMPANY ABSENT A JUDGMENT AGAINST THE INSURED. DEFENDANT NATIONAL INDEMNITY COMPANY, INC. IS NOT A PROPER DEFENDANT AND CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO THEM, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY TAM, CHIU HUNG AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. NATIONAL INDEMNITY COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-105 **ANSWER** RE:IMPROPER DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL INDEMNITY COMPANY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, CHIU HUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL LIABILITY & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
